```{r}
                         linetype = prevalence,
                         group = interaction(tx, prevalence))) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1000, linetype = "dotted", color = "grey50") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 500,  linetype = "dotted", color = "grey50") +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors, name = "Group") +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = linetypes, name = "Baseline event rate") +
  labs(x = "Time", y = "Effective sample size") +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 10)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1600)) +
  theme_minimal()

p_event <- ggplot(df_summary_std, aes(x = events, y = n.eff,
                           color = tx,
                           linetype = prevalence,
                           group = interaction(tx, prevalence))) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1000, linetype = "dotted", color = "grey50") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 500,  linetype = "dotted", color = "grey50") +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors, name = "Group") +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = linetypes, name = "Baseline event rate") +
  labs(x = "Number of events") +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 1000)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1600)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme( axis.text.y = element_blank(), 
         axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
         axis.title.y = element_blank())


p_event_prop <- ggplot(df_summary_std, aes(x = events_rate, y = n.eff,
                           color = tx,
                           linetype = prevalence,
                           group = interaction(tx, prevalence))) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1000, linetype = "dotted", color = "grey50") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 500,  linetype = "dotted", color = "grey50") +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors, name = "Group") +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = linetypes, name = "Baseline event rate") +
  labs(x = "Proportion of total events") +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 1)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1600)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme( axis.text.y = element_blank(), 
         axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
         axis.title.y = element_blank()) 



df_large <- bind_rows(
  lapply(1:100, function(r)
    run_one(r, scale, shape, maxtime, hr, 10000, time_grid, model_type = "standard")
  )
)

df_large$prevalence <- factor(df_large$prevalence, levels = c("75%", "50%", "25%", "10%", "5%"))
df_large <- df_large %>%
  group_by(tx, prevalence) %>%
  mutate(events = max(n.risk) - n.risk)
df_summary_large <- df_large %>%
  group_by(time, tx, prevalence) %>%
  summarise(
    n.eff = mean(n.eff),
    surv = mean(surv),
    events = mean(events),
    .groups = "drop"
  )  %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(tx, prevalence) %>%
  mutate(events_rate = events / max(events),
         surv_prop = (1-surv)/max(1-surv)) %>%
  ungroup()


p_time_large <- ggplot(df_summary_large, aes(x = time, y = n.eff,
                         color = tx,
                         linetype = prevalence,
                         group = interaction(tx, prevalence))) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 10000, linetype = "dotted", color = "grey50") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 5000,  linetype = "dotted", color = "grey50") +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors, name = "Group") +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = linetypes, name = "Baseline event rate") +
  labs(x = "Time", y = "Effective sample size") +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 10)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 16000)) +
  theme_minimal()

p_event_large <- ggplot(df_summary_large, aes(x = events, y = n.eff,
                           color = tx,
                           linetype = prevalence,
                           group = interaction(tx, prevalence))) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 10000, linetype = "dotted", color = "grey50") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 5000,  linetype = "dotted", color = "grey50") +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors, name = "Group") +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = linetypes, name = "Baseline event rate") +
  labs(x = "Number of events") +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 10000)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 16000)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme( axis.text.y = element_blank(), 
         axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
         axis.title.y = element_blank())


p_event_prop_large <- ggplot(df_summary_large, aes(x = events_rate, y = n.eff,
                         color = tx,
                         linetype = prevalence,
                         group = interaction(tx, prevalence))) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 10000, linetype = "dotted", color = "grey50") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 5000,  linetype = "dotted", color = "grey50") +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors, name = "Group") +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = linetypes, name = "Baseline event rate") +
  labs(x = "Proportion of final events") +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 1)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 16000)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme( axis.text.y = element_blank(), 
         axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
         axis.title.y = element_blank())

p_surv_large <- ggplot(df_summary_large, aes(x = 1-surv, y = n.eff,
                         color = tx,
                         linetype = prevalence,
                         group = interaction(tx, prevalence))) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors, name = "Group") +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = linetypes, name = "Baseline event rate") +
  labs(x = "Event incidence", y = "Effective sample size") +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 1)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 16000)) +
  theme_minimal()


# Combine the plots using patchwork and add a single legend on the right
combined_plot <- ( ( p_time | p_event | p_event_prop )  ) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Effective sample size for different event rates",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0))
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "right")

# Combine the plots using patchwork and add a single legend on the right
combined_plot_large <- ( ( p_time_large | p_event_large | p_event_prop_large )  ) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Effective sample size for different event rates with larger development sample size (N=10,000)",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0))
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "right")

# Print the combined plot
print(combined_plot)
print(combined_plot_large)
```

```{r} 
# Seed for consistency
set.seed(1923)

shape = c(0.5) # shape 1 means exponential
scale = c(lambda(0.25, shape), lambda(0.5, shape), lambda(0.75, shape), lambda(0.9, shape), lambda(0.95, shape)) # scale
maxtime = 10 # maxtime
hr = 2 # hazard ratio
n = 1000 # number per group
time_grid <- seq(0, 10, by = 0.001)
n_sim <- 10  # choose number of repeats

df_robust <- bind_rows(
  lapply(1:n_sim, function(r)
    run_one(r, scale, shape, maxtime, hr, n, time_grid, model_type = "robust")
  )
)

df_robust$prevalence <- factor(df_robust$prevalence,
                               levels = c(0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 0.9, 0.95), 
                               labels = c("75%", "50%", "25%", "10%", "5%"))
df_robust <- df_robust %>%
  group_by(tx, prevalence) %>%
  mutate(events = max(n.risk) - n.risk)
df_summary_rob <- df_robust %>%
  group_by(time, tx, prevalence) %>%
  summarise(
    n.eff = mean(n.eff),
    surv = mean(surv),
    events = mean(events),
    .groups = "drop"
  )  %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(tx, prevalence) %>%
  mutate(events_rate = events / max(events),
         surv_prop = (1-surv)/max(1-surv)) %>%
  ungroup()

colors <- c("0" = "#37293F", "1" = "#9f84af")

linetypes <- c(
  "75%" = "twodash",
  "50%" = "solid",
  "25%" = "dashed",
  "10%" = "dotted",
  "5%" = "dotdash"
)

p_time <- ggplot(df_summary_rob, aes(x = time, y = n.eff,
                         color = tx,
                         linetype = prevalence,
                         group = interaction(tx, prevalence))) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1000, linetype = "dotted", color = "grey50") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 500,  linetype = "dotted", color = "grey50") +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors, name = "Group") +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = linetypes, name = "Baseline event rate") +
  labs(x = "Time", y = "Effective sample size") +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 10)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1600)) +
  theme_minimal()

p_event <- ggplot(df_summary_rob, aes(x = events, y = n.eff,
                           color = tx,
                           linetype = prevalence,
                           group = interaction(tx, prevalence))) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1000, linetype = "dotted", color = "grey50") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 500,  linetype = "dotted", color = "grey50") +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors, name = "Group") +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = linetypes, name = "Baseline event rate") +
  labs(x = "Number of events") +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 1000)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1600)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme( axis.text.y = element_blank(), 
         axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
         axis.title.y = element_blank())


p_event_prop <- ggplot(df_summary_rob, aes(x = events_rate, y = n.eff,
                           color = tx,
                           linetype = prevalence,
                           group = interaction(tx, prevalence))) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1000, linetype = "dotted", color = "grey50") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 500,  linetype = "dotted", color = "grey50") +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors, name = "Group") +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = linetypes, name = "Baseline event rate") +
  labs(x = "Proportion of total events") +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 1)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1600)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme( axis.text.y = element_blank(), 
         axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
         axis.title.y = element_blank()) 

# Combine the plots using patchwork and add a single legend on the right
combined_plot <- ( ( p_time | p_event | p_event_prop )  ) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Effective sample size for different event rates",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0))
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "right")

# Print the combined plot
print(combined_plot)
```

```{r}
# Seed for consistency
set.seed(1923)

shape = c(0.5) # shape 1 means exponential
# make a vector of all lambda's from 0.01 to 0.99 in the scale parameter, so do lambda(x, shape) for all x in that range
scale =  sapply(seq(0.01, 0.99, by = 0.01), function(x) lambda(x, shape)) # scale
maxtime = 10 # maxtime
hr = 2 # hazard ratio
n = 1000 # number per group
time_grid <- seq(0, 10, by = 0.001)
n_sim <- 10  # choose number of repeats

df <- bind_rows(
  lapply(1:n_sim, function(r)
    run_one(r, scale, shape, maxtime, hr, n, time_grid, model_type = "standard")
  )
)

# Levels need to be from 1% to 99% in the prevalence variable as character
#df$prevalence <- factor(df$prevalence, levels = seq(0.01, 0.99, 0.01) )
df <- df %>%
  group_by(tx, prevalence) %>%
  mutate(events = max(n.risk) - n.risk)
df_summary <- df %>%
  group_by(time, tx, prevalence) %>%
  summarise(
    n.eff = mean(n.eff),
    surv = mean(surv),
    events = mean(events),
    .groups = "drop"
  )  %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(tx, prevalence) %>%
  mutate(events_rate = events / max(events),
         surv_prop = (1-surv)/max(1-surv)) %>%
  ungroup()

max_points <- df_summary %>%
  group_by(tx, prevalence) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = 1-surv, n = 1) %>%
  ungroup()

p_surv <- ggplot(df_summary[df_summary$tx == 0,], aes(x = 1-surv, y = n.eff,
                         color = prevalence,
                         group = interaction(tx, prevalence))) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.7, alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_line(data = max_points,
            aes(x = 1-surv, y = n.eff, group = 1),
            color = "#37293F", linewidth = 1.2, linetype = "solid") +
  scale_color_gradient(low="#2E7691", high = "#C2666B") +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = linetypes, name = "Baseline event rate") +
  labs(x = "Event incidence", y = "Effective sample size") +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 1)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1600)) +
  theme_minimal()

library(ggnewscale) # For multiple color scales

p_surv <- ggplot(df_summary, aes(x = 1-surv, y = n.eff)) +
  # For tx == 0
  geom_line(data = subset(df_summary, tx == 0),
            aes(color = prevalence, group = interaction(tx, prevalence)),
            linewidth = 0.5, alpha = 0.2) +
  scale_color_gradient(low = "#a8d3e3", high = "#153744", name = "Prevalence (tx=0)") +
  # For tx == 1
  new_scale_color() +
  geom_line(data = subset(df_summary, tx == 1),
            aes(color = prevalence, group = interaction(tx, prevalence)),
            linewidth = 1, alpha = 0.3) +
  scale_color_gradient(low = "#dfafb2", high = "#8b373c", name = "Prevalence (tx=1)") +
  # Add solid line for max points (new color scale)
  new_scale_color() +
  geom_line(data = max_points,
            aes(x = 1-surv, y = n.eff, group = tx, color = factor(tx)),
            linewidth = 1, linetype = "solid") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("0" = "#2E7691", "1" = "#C2666B"),
                     name = "Treatment") +
  labs(x = "Event incidence", y = "Effective sample size") +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 1)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1600)) +
  theme_minimal()

```


<!-- events_50 <- simsurv( dist="weibull",  -->
<!--                    gammas=shape,  -->
<!--                    lambdas=scale[1],  -->
<!--                    x=data.frame(tx = c(rep(0, n/2), rep(1, n/2))), -->
<!--                    betas = c("tx" = log(hr)), -->
<!--                    maxt=maxtime) -->
<!-- events_25 <- simsurv( dist="weibull",  -->
<!--                    gammas=shape,  -->
<!--                    lambdas=scale[2],  -->
<!--                    x=data.frame(tx = c(rep(0, n/2), rep(1, n/2))), -->
<!--                    betas = c("tx" = log(hr)), -->
<!--                    maxt=maxtime) -->
<!-- events_10 <- simsurv( dist="weibull",  -->
<!--                    gammas=shape,  -->
<!--                    lambdas=scale[3],  -->
<!--                    x=data.frame(tx = c(rep(0, n/2), rep(1, n/2))), -->
<!--                    betas = c("tx" = log(hr)), -->
<!--                    maxt=maxtime) -->
<!-- events_5 <- simsurv( dist="weibull",  -->
<!--                    gammas=shape,  -->
<!--                    lambdas=scale[4],  -->
<!--                    x=data.frame(tx = c(rep(0, n/2), rep(1, n/2))), -->
<!--                    betas = c("tx" = log(hr)), -->
<!--                    maxt=maxtime) -->
<!-- events_50$tx = c(rep(0, n/2), rep(1, n/2)) -->
<!-- events_25$tx = c(rep(0, n/2), rep(1, n/2)) -->
<!-- events_10$tx = c(rep(0, n/2), rep(1, n/2)) -->
<!-- events_5$tx = c(rep(0, n/2), rep(1, n/2)) -->

<!-- cox_50 <- coxph(Surv(eventtime, status) ~ tx, data = events_50) -->
<!-- cox_25 <- coxph(Surv(eventtime, status) ~ tx, data = events_25) -->
<!-- cox_10 <- coxph(Surv(eventtime, status) ~ tx, data = events_10) -->
<!-- cox_5 <- coxph(Surv(eventtime, status) ~ tx, data = events_5) -->

<!-- cox_50_n0 <- survfit_n(survfit(cox_50, newdata = data.frame(tx = 0)), cox_50, coef=T, chaz=T) -->
<!-- cox_25_n0 <- survfit_n(survfit(cox_25, newdata = data.frame(tx = 0)), cox_25, coef=T, chaz=T) -->
<!-- cox_10_n0 <- survfit_n(survfit(cox_10, newdata = data.frame(tx = 0)), cox_10, coef=T, chaz=T) -->
<!-- cox_5_n0 <- survfit_n(survfit(cox_5, newdata = data.frame(tx = 0)), cox_5, coef=T, chaz=T) -->

<!-- cox_50_n1 <- survfit_n(survfit(cox_50, newdata = data.frame(tx = 1)), cox_50, coef=T, chaz=T) -->
<!-- cox_25_n1 <- survfit_n(survfit(cox_25, newdata = data.frame(tx = 1)), cox_25, coef=T, chaz=T) -->
<!-- cox_10_n1 <- survfit_n(survfit(cox_10, newdata = data.frame(tx = 1)), cox_10, coef=T, chaz=T) -->
<!-- cox_5_n1 <- survfit_n(survfit(cox_5, newdata = data.frame(tx = 1)), cox_5, coef=T, chaz=T) -->

<!-- cox_50_robust <- coxph(Surv(eventtime, status) ~ tx, data = events_50, robust = TRUE) -->
<!-- cox_25_robust <- coxph(Surv(eventtime, status) ~ tx, data = events_25, robust = TRUE) -->
<!-- cox_10_robust <- coxph(Surv(eventtime, status) ~ tx, data = events_10, robust = TRUE) -->
<!-- cox_5_robust <- coxph(Surv(eventtime, status) ~ tx, data = events_5, robust = TRUE) -->

<!-- cox_50_robust_n0 <- survfit_n(survfit(cox_50_robust, newdata = data.frame(tx = 0)), cox_50_robust, coef=T, chaz=T) -->
<!-- cox_25_robust_n0 <- survfit_n(survfit(cox_25_robust, newdata = data.frame(tx = 0)), cox_25_robust, coef=T, chaz=T) -->
<!-- cox_10_robust_n0 <- survfit_n(survfit(cox_10_robust, newdata = data.frame(tx = 0)), cox_10_robust, coef=T, chaz=T) -->
<!-- cox_5_robust_n0 <- survfit_n(survfit(cox_5_robust, newdata = data.frame(tx = 0)), cox_5_robust, coef=T, chaz=T) -->

<!-- cox_50_robust_n1 <- survfit_n(survfit(cox_50_robust, newdata = data.frame(tx = 1)), cox_50_robust, coef=T, chaz=T) -->
<!-- cox_25_robust_n1 <- survfit_n(survfit(cox_25_robust, newdata = data.frame(tx = 1)), cox_25_robust, coef=T, chaz=T) -->
<!-- cox_10_robust_n1 <- survfit_n(survfit(cox_10_robust, newdata = data.frame(tx = 1)), cox_10_robust, coef=T, chaz=T) -->
<!-- cox_5_robust_n1 <- survfit_n(survfit(cox_5_robust, newdata = data.frame(tx = 1)), cox_5_robust, coef=T, chaz=T) -->

<!-- df <- bind_rows( -->
<!--   extract_sf(cox_50_n0, 0, "50%"), -->
<!--   extract_sf(cox_50_n1, 1, "50%"), -->
<!--   extract_sf(cox_25_n0, 0, "75%"), -->
<!--   extract_sf(cox_25_n1, 1, "75%"), -->
<!--   extract_sf(cox_10_n0, 0, "90%"), -->
<!--   extract_sf(cox_10_n1, 1, "90%"), -->
<!--   extract_sf(cox_5_n0, 0, "95%"), -->
<!--   extract_sf(cox_5_n1, 1, "95%") -->
<!-- ) -->

:::{#refs}

:::
